Total Credits

1 At least 3 of these courses must be in the College of Agriculture and Natural Resources for students not majoring in a program outside of the College of Agriculture and Natural Resources.

2 Prerequisite: completion of the travel study requirement. This course will require student presentation of their travel experience including a paper, a poster presentation, as well as an oral presentation and discussion.
